tasks.subject: Analyze Backend Port to TypeScript
tasks.description: Determine if porting the entire Laravel backend to TypeScript is feasible within the current constraints and explore alternatives like Bun/Elysia or NestJS, while acknowledging that a full port is a massive undertaking.

tasks.subject: Implement Backend API 404 Fallback
tasks.description: Implement a fallback route in Laravel to return JSON 404s instead of HTML, ensuring the frontend handles missing API endpoints gracefully.

tasks.subject: Complete Frontend API Migration
tasks.description: Finish migrating the remaining 5 frontend API modules (bulletin-boards.ts, friends.ts, location.ts, merchant.ts, photos.ts) from raw fetch/axios to the centralized apiClient.
